  "claims": [
    "SB 423 would protect public health and voting rights before the 2020 General Election.",
    "Safe and accessible voting locations are critical for protecting voter rights for all Californians.",
    "SB 423 guarantees that voters will have safe, secure, and convenient in-person opportunities to cast their ballots.",
    "The expanded use of voting by mail, paired with safe and sanitary polling locations, is the surest way to protect poll workers and voters.",
